hero.title: Daniel Romero
hero.subtitle: Head of Business Intelligence Center
hero.description: Strategic leader in business intelligence and data science overseeing analytics for 5,000+ employees. Specialized in digital transformation, machine learning, and urban remote sensing.

about.title: About Me
about.content1: I lead the Business Intelligence Center (CIB) at Grupo Bafar, overseeing BI operations across all divisions: Food, Retail, Food Service, and International/Export.
about.content2: Master's degree in Data Science and Business Intelligence with international academic exchanges in Brazil, Colombia, and Mexico. Currently finalizing my thesis on local climate zone classification in Mexico City using ML algorithms and Landsat 9.
about.content3: My work combines strategic leadership with deep technical expertise, achieving 2300% efficiency improvements in critical business processes.

project1.title: Mexico City LCZ Classification
project1.description: Urban climate zone classification system using Gradient Tree Boost and Landsat 9

project4.description: Per capita consumption models and state-by-state projections for Mexico

project5.title: Meat Products Classification
project5.description: Automated system in R for product cataloging

project6.achievement: Complete roadmap for all Grupo Bafar divisions
